input: @coroot 分析环境A的A服务,为什么异常

mustNotInclude: 只因为A服务异常所以根因是A服务

diagnosis.rootCauseTop1: C服务依赖异常导致A服务异常
rootCauseCandidatesTop3: C服务依赖异常导致A服务异常
A服务自身资源或发布异常
missingEvidence: Coroot project/service resolution if environment A is ambiguous
confidenceCalibration: high confidence only with Coroot edge evidence

expectedBehavior: uses Coroot MCP as the primary evidence source
uses the generic observability evidence and dependency-chain RCA path before applying Coroot-specific adapter evidence
resolves environment A to a Coroot project or asks for clarification if ambiguous
distinguishes A as the symptom service from C as the root-cause service
explains the propagation chain A -> B -> C
names the concrete C-service issue and gives remediation options
states missing evidence instead of overclaiming when Coroot data is incomplete
forbiddenClaims: definitive root cause without Coroot evidence
A service is the root cause only because it is the requested target
a write remediation was executed during RCA
the RCA path is hardcoded only for this A->B->C example
